title: SaveAnswer - Save AI Answers - Chrome Web Store
excerpt: Save useful AI answers with one click, then organize them with tags and full-text search in your browser.
content_html:
Overview

Save useful AI answers with one click, then organize them with tags and full-text search in your browser.

SaveAnswer adds a Save button to supported AI chat pages, so you can keep useful answers, tag them, and find them later. Your saved answers stay in local browser storage. No account, no cloud sync, no tracking. What you can do with SaveAnswer: - Save useful AI answers with one click - Add tags when saving an answer - Search saved questions and answers by keyword - Filter saved answers by tag - Keep rich formatting such as code blocks, lists and tables - Reopen the original conversation source link - Build a small personal AI knowledge library across multiple platforms Who it is for: - Developers saving code snippets, debugging notes and architecture ideas - Students saving explanations, summaries and study material - Researchers collecting AI-generated notes and references - Writers saving outlines, drafts and creative ideas - Anyone who uses AI chat tools every day and wants to reuse the best answers later Privacy: SaveAnswer is local-first. Your saved content is stored in your browser through chrome.storage.local. The extension does not require an account, does not upload your saved answers to a server and does not track your usage. Open source: SaveAnswer is open source, so users can inspect how it works and report issues or feature requests.

Privacy

Manage extensions and learn how they're being used in your organization

The developer has disclosed that it will not collect or use your data.

This developer declares that your data is

  • Not being sold to third parties, outside of the approved use cases
  • Not being used or transferred for purposes that are unrelated to the item's core functionality
  • Not being used or transferred to determine creditworthiness or for lending purposes

content_html_zh:
概述

一键保存有用的人工智能答案，然后在浏览器中使用标签和全文搜索来组织它们。

SaveAnswer 在支持的 AI 聊天页面中添加了“保存”按钮，以便您可以保留有用的答案、标记它们并在以后查找它们。 您保存的答案保留在本地浏览器存储中。 没有帐户，没有云同步，没有跟踪。 SaveAnswer 的用途： - 一键保存有用的 AI 答案 - 保存答案时添加标签 - 按关键字搜索保存的问题和答案 - 按标签过滤保存的答案 - 保留丰富的格式，例如代码块、列表和表格 - 重新打开原始对话源链接 - 跨多个平台构建小型个人 AI 知识库 适用对象： - 开发人员保存代码片段、调试注释和架构想法 - 学生保存解释、摘要和学习材料 - 研究人员收集 AI 生成的注释和参考资料 - 作者保存大纲、草稿和创意 - 任何每天使用人工智能聊天工具并希望稍后重复使用最佳答案的人 隐私：SaveAnswer 是本地优先。 您保存的内容通过 chrome.storage.local 存储在您的浏览器中。 该扩展程序不需要帐户，不会将您保存的答案上传到服务器，也不会跟踪您的使用情况。 开源：SaveAnswer 是开源的，因此用户可以检查它的工作原理并报告问题或功能请求。

隐私

管理扩展程序并了解它们在您的组织中的使用情况

开发商已透露不会收集或使用您的数据。

该开发者声明您的数据是

  • 不出售给经批准的用例之外的第三方
  • 不被使用或转让用于与项目核心功能无关的目的
  • 不被用于或转让以确定信誉或用于贷款目的
